source: Command runtime backlog and reset-sync-h10-command-policy shared common prototype distilled into a shared-ownership readiness manifest
description: Pins the public facade command behavior families that must remain covered before reset, sync, H10 recording, and exercise command planning delegates to shared runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: Command runtime shared ownership remains valid while reset-sync-h10-command-policy.json and this readiness manifest are executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS facade tests continue to reference the same vectors, H10 query failure propagation, live/offline exercise query planning, every reset-style notification failure propagation, and public facade error mapping are pinned, sync-start and sync-stop platform splits are preserved or explicitly reconciled, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest runtime planning guard
commonRuntimePrototype.reason: Declared because this vector is consumed by runtime or fake-transport policy tests before production shared ownership.

notes: This readiness manifest is a shared ownership gate for public facade command-planning behavior-family completeness only; H10 query failure semantics, live/offline exercise query planning, reset-style notification failure semantics, sync failure semantics, public facade error mapping, platform adapter references, and compile verification remain required before production command runtime code moves to shared.
